channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe’s vivid English first names carry family histories, from Privilege to Shame

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)

item.title: Zimbabwe appoints first female Chief Justice as Elizabeth Gwaunza Takes over
item.description: By Shelton Muchena| Today Zimbabwe made history by appointing its first ever female Chief Justice, Elizabeth Gwaunza who replaces the... Continue reading "Zimbabwe appoints first female Chief Justice as Elizabeth Gwaunza Takes over" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chief Justice Malaba bows out, but term extension controversy will define his legacy
item.description: Malaba retires to what Deputy Chief Justice Gwaunza described as two great passions: reading and ranching The post Chief Justice Malaba bows out, but term extension controversy will define his legacy appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Bangladesh to host tour by Zimbabwe ‘A’ next month @3menonaboat
item.description:
This is part of what is expecting to be a busier year for the Zimbabwe A side.

The post Bangladesh to host tour by Zimbabwe ‘A’ next month first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Watch: Phathisani Sibanda Buys Brand-New Toyota Fortuner for US$100 After Zimpapers Gift Ban @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Watch: Phathisani Sibanda Buys Brand-New Toyota Fortuner for US$100 After Zimpapers Gift Ban Renowned radio personality Phathisani Sibanda has acquired a brand-new 2025 Toyota Fortuner GD6 for just US$100 after businessman Wicknell Chivayo converted a previously gifted vehicle in via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Attorney General insists CAB3 referendum an ‘unconstitutional demand’
item.description: ‘Any insistence on a referendum given the current scenario is devoid of any meaningful legal basis and logic’ The post Attorney General insists CAB3 referendum an ‘unconstitutional demand’ appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Beyond the numbers: Teenage pregnancy in Mbire and the national crisis beyond the statistics @263Chat
item.description: According to ZDHS 2023/24 findings, rural adolescent pregnancy prevalence stands at approximately 30%, compared to about 15% in urban areas. The post Beyond the numbers: Teenage pregnancy in Mbire and the national crisis beyond the statistics appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Henkel Ventures co-leads Ruka’s $4.5m round
item.description: Ruka, the London-based textured-hair company founded by Zimbabwean entrepreneur Varaidzo Tendai Moyo and her co-founder Ugorji Agbai, has closed a $4.5m round co-led by Henkel Ventures and Freedom Trail Capital. The deal, which takes lifetime funding to roughly $10m and brings on via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Zimbabwe to cut mobile money charges in financial sector reforms @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Zimbabwe to cut mobile money charges in financial sector reforms -Newsday Zimbabwe HARARE, May 12 (NewsDay) – Zimbabwe plans to reduce mobile money transfer charges as part of wider financial sector reforms aimed at lowering transaction costs and improving financial inclu via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Malls power new wave of investor confidence in Zim property @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Malls power new wave of investor confidence in Zim property -Newsday Zimbabwe INVESTOR confidence in Zimbabwe’s real estate sector is increasingly anchored on adaptive commercial models that can withstand economic uncertainty, economists have said. Analysts say the shift via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: A new dawn as Tembo restores The Warriors’ soul @zimsituation
item.description: Source: A new dawn as Tembo restores The Warriors’ soul -Newsday Zimbabwe THE elevation of Kaitano Tembo to the helm of the Zimbabwe national football team, following the abrupt and welcome resignation of Marian Marinica, feels less like a simple coach change and more like a rest via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Ministry halts illegal construction at Harare’s protected Ramsar Site @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Ministry halts illegal construction at Harare’s protected Ramsar Site –Newsday Zimbabwe HARARE, May 12, 2026 — The hum of a bulldozer is rarely the sound of progress when it echoes across the delicate grasses of Monavale Vlei, one of the few remaining lungs of Harare. To via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Four Killed After Bus Swerves To Avoid Pedestrian On Harare–Masvingo Road
item.description: Four Dead After Asian Star Bus Overturns Near Mvuma Four people died and four others were injured after an Asian Star bus travelling from Masvingo to Harare collided head-on with a Mercedes-Benz Atego truck along the Harare–Masvingo Road in the early hours of Tuesday morning. The via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Scott Sakupwanya’s Betterbrands Signs US$200k Deal To Revive NASH Sports Programme
item.description: Betterbrands Pumps US$200k Into Zimbabwe School Sports Revival Businessman Scott Sakupwanya’s company Betterbrands has signed a US$200,000 (approximately R3.7 million) partnership with Zimbabwe’s Ministry of Primary and Secondary Education to revive the National Association of Se via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News
